question: Suppose on five consecutive days in a given month the number of customers who enter services at a printing shop were $48,60,78,56$, and 73 Test the null hypothesis that the expected numbers of customers per day were the same on the five days at the 5\% level of significance using the Chi-square test.
answer: The number of customers who enter the restaurant per day were not the same on the five days at the $5 \%$ level of significance.
